zh.Kinver, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾金巴
zh.lifeSummary: Thomas de la Lowe於大約1320年出生在英國斯塔福爾金巴。他於大約1350年與Petronilla de Beckbury在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾金巴結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1374年之後。

zh-hans.Kinver, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾金巴
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas de la Lowe于大约1320年出生在英国斯塔福爾金巴。他于大约1350年与Petronilla de Beckbury在英国英格兰斯塔福爾金巴结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1374年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Lowe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Low  .

German (Löwe) and Danish (Løwe): from Middle High German lēwe, löuwe ‘lion’, hence a nickname for a brave or regal person. In some cases the surname may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn distinguished by the sign of a lion. It is also found in Sweden. Compare Loewe 1, Lau , Lave , and Lurvey .
Jewish (Ashkenazic; Löwe): artificial name from German Löwe ‘lion’.

variants.name: Lau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wai, Wing, Kam, Kwok, Ming, Chi, Yuk, Chun, Kin, Ching, Kwan, Man.

German: nickname for a physically strong person, from Middle High German louwe, lauwe ‘lion’. In some cases the surname may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn distinguished by the sign of a lion. Compare Lowe .
German: topographic name for someone living in a bush-covered area or clearing, Middle Low German lo, loch, lage, Middle High German lō.

variants.name: Loew
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Eckhard, Fritz, Hans, Heinz, Hermann, Manfred, Raimund.
German (mainly Löw): variant of Löwe ‘lion’ (see Lowe 2). The surname Loew is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Low 5.

variants.name: Lobe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Erwin, Horst, Otto, Winfried.
German (Löbe): variant of Löwe ‘lion’ (see Lowe 2).
German: metonymic occupational name for a tanner, from Middle High German lō ‘tanning bark’.

variants.name: Loewe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Armin, Gerhard, Helmuth, Klaus, Kurt.
German (mainly Löwe): see Lowe 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Löwe): artificial name from German Löwe ‘lion’. Compare Lowe 3.

variants.name: Loewen
meanings: German (Löwen): variant of Löwe ‘lion’ (see Lowe 2). Compare Lowen 2.

variants.name: Low
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tumulus, mound or hill, Middle English lowe, from Old English hlāw (see Law 2).

Scottish and English: nickname for a short man, from Middle English lah, lowe (Old Norse lágr; the word was adopted first into the northern dialects of Middle English, where Scandinavian influence was strong, and then spread south, with regular alteration of the vowel quality).

English and Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname for a violent or dangerous person, from Anglo-Norman French lou, leu ‘wolf’ (from Latin lupus). Wolves were relatively common in Britain at the time when most surnames were formed, as there still existed large tracts of uncleared forest.

variants.name: Lurvey
meanings: Americanized form of German Löwe ‘lion’ (see Lowe 2).
History: Peter Lurvy, the immigrant ancestor of this family, was in Ipswich, MA, by 1679.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas de la Lowe was born about 1320, in Kinver, Staffordshire, England. He married Petronilla de Beckbury about 1350, in Kinver, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died after 1374.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas de la Lowe est né environ 1320, à Kinver, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Petronilla de Beckbury environ 1350, à Kinver, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé après 1374.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas de la Lowe wurde um 1320 in Kinver, Staffordshire, England geboren. Er hat um 1350 in Kinver, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Petronilla de Beckbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb nach 1374.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas de la Lowe è nato il circa 1320 nel Kinver, Staffordshire, England. Lui sposato Petronilla de Beckbury circa 1350, nel Kinver, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1374.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de la Lowe(은)는 대략 1320년 영국 스태퍼드실르 킨버에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 킨버에서 Petronilla de Beckbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1374년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas de la Lowe nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Kinver, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Petronilla de Beckbury aproximadamente 1350, em Kinver, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu após 1374.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas de la Lowe родился около 1320 г. в местности кинвир, стаффордшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Petronilla de Beckbury около 1350 г. в местности кинвир, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер после 1374 г.
